productDisplayName: Puma Men Green Polo Neck T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsGreen polo neck T-shirt, pique knit, ribbed spread collar, short and ribbed buttoned placket with overlock details, short sleeves with black flatlock, branding detail on left sleeve, branding embroidered on left front chest, brand badge on left hem, vented hem with back longer than the frontMaterials and Care100% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
